title: MoreCookies
description: A mod that adds more cookies and a cookie armor/tool set!
body:
**Did you ever want more cookies? And want a cursed mod? well, this is the perfect mod for you!**
### **This is a mod that adds more (cursed) cookies!**
![overview of all the diffrent cookies and the cookiefluid
](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5bc415a56bc7218e1abba25428bed0d87879352.png)

these are the features that the mod adds:
- infested cookie
- bread cookie
- steak cookie
- potato cookies
- golden cookie(like the enchanted golden apple but, cookie(and OP))
- cookie fluid
- plans to make more!


<details>
<summary>crafting recipies</summary>
This mod uses smithing table beacuse why not. The pictures have the recipies. In all recipies you leave the first slot with nothing(no don't put a barrier there please don't).

           
![crafting recipy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bf03304a8ab4dacfe6c4ac4ee5a87abc2d2063b.png)
![crafting recipy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b21a114d8a4e45803c03ec0e1d77fb02c372c70.png)
</details>
<details>
<summary>No independences!</summary>
Are you also tired of mods which need to simply use that ONE mod? Well this one doesn't need any!!!
(except if you count forge)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
  thanks to my sister (@hedgehogmo on Discord) for giving me inspiration
  MCreator for being an amazing mod maker!
</details>
